// // This module splits a 16-bit input into two 8-bit outputs
module top_module( 
    input wire [7:0] in_hi,
    input wire [7:0] in_lo,
    output wire [15:0] out );assign out = {in_hi, in_lo};  // Concatenate the two input bytes into a half-word

endmodule
